title: Astralis Constructs
description: A modpack featuring the Create mod and its extensive suite of addons, offering a focused experience for mechanical automation and creative building.
body:
# Astralis Constructs
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15e0a1c4cd31de5d5246f99e3afb2bc948d647f5_0.webp)

**Embark on an interstellar journey where futuristic technology meets magical innovation!** In **Astralis Constructs**, you’ll explore distant planets, build complex automated systems, and pilot massive magical mechs across diverse worlds. This modpack blends high-tech machinery and magical constructs for an unforgettable cosmic adventure.

---

![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/dnL5dfkS?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=%231bc90d) ![Modrinth Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/dnL5dfkS?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/dnL5dfkS?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=red) ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1332989818975551550?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=DISCORD&color=blue)

## **Key Mods and Features**  

### **Applied Energistics 2 (AE2)** 🖧  
Master advanced data storage and network management! Automate crafting, streamline resource storage, and connect your base with intricate systems using quantum bridges and wireless networks.

### **Ad Astra 🚀**  
Travel beyond Earth's atmosphere to planets, moons, and space stations. Build rockets, establish interplanetary colonies, and manage oxygen systems in this expansive space mod. With **Planets+ and Ad Extendra**, you get even more celestial destinations to explore.

### **Tech Reborn ⚙️**  
Harness industrial power with cutting-edge machines. Generate energy, process ores, and automate your production lines with high-tech solutions inspired by classic industrial mods.

### **Magitek Mechs 🛡️**  
Pilot powerful, magical mechs that blend advanced technology with arcane forces. Crush enemies, traverse rugged terrain, and customize your mech with powerful upgrades.

---

## **Supporting Mods for a Complete Space Experience**  

- **Astrocraft**: Adds deeper Ad Astra compatibility and enhancements for immersive planetary gameplay.  
- **Iris Shaders & Sodium Extra**: Boost performance and experience gorgeous, immersive visuals.  
- **Flux Networks**: Manage power networks wirelessly and efficiently.  
- **Traveler's Backpack 🎒**: Carry all your essentials on galactic expeditions.  
- **Tectonic 🌍**: Unique terrain generation for varied and beautiful planetary landscapes.  
- **Quarry Reborn 🏗️**: Automate resource extraction with powerful mining solutions.  
- **Patchouli 📚**: Comprehensive guides to help you navigate complex systems in the modpack.  
- **Waystones 🗺️**: Teleport between key locations across galaxies and planetary bases.  

---

## **Enhanced Gameplay Quality**  

- **Polymorphic Energistics & AE2 QoL Recipes**: Streamline AE2 crafting and integration for ultimate efficiency.  
- **EMI & EMI Add-ons**: An all-in-one crafting and inventory interface to simplify complex recipes.  
- **Sound Physics Remastered 🎧**: Experience realistic spatial audio and enhanced acoustics.  
- **Dynamic FPS & FerriteCore ⚡**: Performance optimizations for a smoother experience.  

---

## **Your Galactic Mission Awaits!**  
Craft advanced technology, uncover ancient magical secrets, and explore breathtaking alien worlds in **Astralis Constructs**. The universe is vast and teeming with endless possibilities—will you rise to the challenge?  

---

### **Disclaimer**  
I do not hold any copyrights to the mods used in this modpack. All credits and rights belong to their respective creators. Please support the amazing developers who made these mods possible!
